{"code":"(defn create-verify-issue [pr]
  (github__create_issue
    {:repo "acme/web"
     :title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))
     :body (str "This issue verifies the changes in PR #" (:number pr) ".")}))

(count (map create-verify-issue matched-issues))"}
